description_long: This object is a vintage television set with a boxy, rectangular wooden exterior and rounded edges, reminiscent of mid-20th-century designs. The front features a large, convex glass screen surrounded by a thick wooden bezel, with a control panel on the right side that includes two rotary knobs and a small button. Two metal V-shaped antennae extend from a black dome on the top, giving it a classic retro appearance. The sides and back are adorned with horizontal ventilation slits, and the wood grain texture is visible throughout the casing. The television sits on small, flat feet, slightly elevating it from the surface. The overall look is robust and nostalgic, suitable for period urban environments or retro-themed settings.
description: A vintage, boxy wooden television with a convex glass screen, metal antennae, and side ventilation slits. Features a right-side control panel with knobs and a button.
description_view_0: Front view showing the convex glass screen, thick wooden bezel, and right-side control panel with knobs and a button.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the curved wooden casing and vertical ventilation slits, with the antenna dome visible on top.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full width of the wooden back panel with multiple horizontal ventilation slits and the central antenna dome.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the curved wooden casing and vertical ventilation slits, with the antenna dome on top.
attribute_bezel_design: Thick, brown wooden bezel with rounded corners and a matte finish.
attribute_control_button_layout: Cluster of two rotary knobs and one button on the front right panel.
